sub_problems: Implement 'epigenic' (external-input-driven) and 'hypogenic' (internal-surprise-driven) knowledge-graph growth as two parallel processes.
Characterize the topology of the graphs each produces; verify they differ as branchwork vs maze (and quantify with graph-topology metrics).
Develop a topology-based classifier that diagnoses, for an unseen graph, what fraction was externally vs internally driven.
